query:
UPDATE portfolioTransactions 
SET fxRate = '0.7985', 
    totalAmountCHF = ROUND(CAST(REPLACE(amount, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) * 0.7985, 2)
WHERE portfolioId = 240001 AND ticker = 'NVDA';
